info.name: Music Library - JC's Personal Catalog
info.description:
Personal music catalog for Railway deployment at https://javabc.up.railway.app

This collection includes curated artists across multiple genres:
- Classic Rock: Pink Floyd, Led Zeppelin, Fleetwood Mac, The Doors
- Electronic/Trance: Above & Beyond, Daft Punk, Tritonal, Denis Kenzo
- Ambient/Chillout: Cafe Del Mar, Solarsoul, Wind of Buri
- Alternative/Indie: Radiohead, Arctic Monkeys, Tame Impala
- Folk/Singer-Songwriter: James Taylor, Simon & Garfunkel, Bon Iver
- Modern Artists: Billie Eilish, The Weeknd, SZA

Collection includes setup requests for genres and artists, followed by album creation requests with real album data.
